mapper.insert: insert into studentinfo (name, sex, idCard, phone, workUnit, address, image,duties,invoiceId) values (#{name}, #{sex}, #{idCard}, #{phone}, #{workUnit}, #{address}, #{image},#{duties},#{invoiceId})
mapper.select:
select s.*,v.bangNo,v.bankName,v.invoiceHead,v.invoiceNo,v.isSpecial,v.unitAddress,v.unitPhone from studentinfo s left join invoiceinfo v on s.invoiceId = v.id
s.name like concat('%',#{name},'%')
and s.invoiceId is not null
and s.invoiceId is null
order by s.id desc
